role: Module-level subscribe store that holds the operator's pending decision stack, coordinates its fetch/filter/enrichment lifecycle, and shares state between DecisionsBar and DecisionsInbox.
capabilities: Filter to Tim-facing pending items by registry-true owner
Map raw registry rows to typed StackItem ('decision-sequence')
Enrich each item from /api/territory with meaning and reversibility
Carry forward existing enrichment across reloads to avoid layout shift
Distinguish cold-load errors from refresh errors
Self-start subscription store via useDecisions hook
Reload stack on gallery:rerender decision-write event
substance_why: Implements the full lifecycle with concrete API endpoints, filtering, enrichment, error/loading/open states, and subscription wiring.
interactions_present: Open decisions list refreshes data on open
Decision write elsewhere triggers stack reload via gallery:rerender
interactions_missing: Retry handler for cold-load errors despite the retry message
Optimistic update on decision take/write before gallery:rerender
Dismiss or reset of refreshError flag
Cancel in-flight fetches when the modal closes
Pagination or virtualization for long stacks
Keyboard shortcut or focus management for a11y
performance_risks: Every open and gallery:rerender triggers a full /api/decisions fetch plus per-item /api/territory enrichment with no request deduplication
No abort for stale enrichment fetches; loadSeq only guards state set, not fetch work
All subscribers re-render on every state patch, including per-item enrichment updates
No caching of territory records; repeated opens re-resolve the same addresses
Overlapping loadDecisions calls can run multiple /api/decisions fetches concurrently
reuse_why: The registry-fetch/filter/enrich semantics and owner-based filtering are domain-correct and should be preserved, but the custom subscribe-store plumbing, error interactions, and fetch concurrency need redesign.
decomposition_hints: Split subscription/store plumbing from data-fetching logic
Separate decisions registry client (/api/decisions fetch + filter + mapping) from territory enrichment client (/api/territory)
Separate modal open-state from data state
Extract StackItem type definitions and owner filter into a shared decisions model
Move retry/refresh/dismiss interactions into a dedicated UI-state/actions layer
